title: Army and Air Force Canteen Service
description: The Army and Air Force Canteen Service (AAFCANS), trading since 1915, provides on-base and deployed convenience food, services and everyday essentials through a variety of retail options. AAFCANS is a non-profit organisation that supports local base community
